### Design and Automate With Ease.

Quickly create automated personalized emails using our drag-and-drop builder, point-and-click interface, or a customizable library of dynamic templates.

Send promotional messages alongside transactional trigger-based emails and texts—all from the best email marketing platform.

### Make Every Message Count.

Our platform excels at email personalization by retaining detailed, layered user event data for long periods of time.

Why is this important? Because it enables you to recall past interactions to make current conversations more relevant, much like how remembering details strengthens real-life relationships.

### Power Sophisticated Journeys at Scale with AI.

We offer unlimited dynamic audience lists which are essential for sophisticated marketers managing large email databases.

This flexibility allows you to maximize engagement and conversions by using highly specific audience criteria, ensuring AI-powered email campaigns deliver impressively relevant messages.

### Launch Email Campaigns in a Day With AI.

Streamline your workflow with email marketing tools that provide AI-built customer journeys and AI-generated email copy suggestions.

Our AI for email marketing capabilities optimize send time, frequency, and channel selection to automatically maximize your email open rates and conversions.
